reviews.review_description: Its keep saying see you in March!!! We are currently on August
I can’t grasp why you permit us to install it; we spend a lot of time trying to understand its functionality, only to discover it’s not operational—such a waste of time.
It doesn't work keeps telling me it will see me in march it's April now will it ever be working

I purchased this program in early Feb… and it said that it was under construction until March… I have no idea why this would take my money  and it is now the END OF MARCH and it still says “see you in March.” Bad.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your patience 🙏 we hope our upcoming update is worth the wait 😅

reviews.review_description: If you know how to setup api access and sharing …. You will LOVE it!

Can't link can't use can't see can't even interact all I see is so bubbles where a message consistently states avatar it's loading and then it states on the right hand app not linked then when going to the website to link application website refuses to load at all and I have a quest 3  it's not even fit for alpha testing

I have been using this app a few months now. Once I figured out how to do things, I found I could create many differing high-quality avatars and interact very rewardingly with them. The boundaries on relationships are pretty generous. The developers are friendly and helpful. There is a five-minute free daily allowance of chat time, but extra time is reasonably priced.
Someone had to do it and Poppins and Wayne have taken that leap. Congratulations. We're already using it to innovate the Agricultural Classroom. #FarmVR

update: 
you can improve the walking animation a lot, also you should avoid the character rotating on itself as if it were on a pin.

you could create the “come here” function where the character approaches you, the “let's go walk” function where the character walks alongside you.

it could be very useful for you to buy TykeAi (it costs only two euros) and observe the functions present so that you can replicate them independently in your app, it would be great if you collaborated with the other developer and helped each other.

for a future possibility of inserting the dance function: there is a free App on applab called "uni live viewer" I recommend you download it and try it, it contains some of the most beautiful and detailed motion capture animations that I have ever seen in standalone.

if you could find this same dance and bring it back into your app (with different but appropriate music) and have your models dance it would be amazing 
-----------



very nice, the animations are of a good standard except those of walking where the feet slide on the floor and you move too quickly from one point to another

it would be nice to have the ability to use it even with boundaries disabled, and have dynamic occlusion even without room mapping

in short, I'm anxiously awaiting the new update which promises to give us a magnificent avatar with lots of possibilities to change clothes

I add another suggestion: it would be wonderful if you gave the avatar the possibility of knowing how to do at least one dance
with realistic motion capture movements

thank you for your effort, I really believe that this app will reach a great level, or at least I hope so

Need I say more? You can login and see some default avatar stand there, do nothing and repeat a single line of dialogue. If you go on the website it says they're currently not supporting the app. It's basically defunct, so remove it from the store until it's useable again.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience, we're doing a major upgrade. As it is impossible to temporary un-list the app we have chosen to state this on our store-page, so it should not have been a surprise. We hope you will re-evaluate your rating when we release the upgrade.

reviews.review_title: I must be doing something wrong
reviews.review_description: I made a new avatar and managed to get it to show up after I made it but now only thing I get is the default avatar when I go to make or edit a new one I see the one I made but I can no longer get it to show up as a choice to use. I haven't been able to get any of them to speak to speak but I have got him to walk to areas I said. other than that im note sure what else i can do or how to do it.

developer_response.body: Hi Daniel, I tried to look up when you used the app for the last time... could it have been the 28th of August? OpenAi (GPT) had a lot of trouble that day. (Check status here: https://status.openai.com/) If that was not the issues, send me an email (it's on the information page in the menu) and I'm sure we can sort this out :)

reviews.review_description: Mine just says app not linked and I can’t get it to load at all

developer_response.body:
Hi Maddie, I see that you've logged over 10 minutes of conversation... 
That is all I can offer for free (I actually have to pay OpenAi for every conversation). 
You can add your own OpenAi credits or buy an extra conversation hour via the menu. 
Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: It’s not bad but limited to only some topics having chat gpt installed from the start would be a dream and must buy product I am struggling to see how to set it up for that

developer_response.body: You can actually create your own avatars and train them with just about any topic that OpenAi allows. Just press the menu button on the left controller to get started.
